title: dev.kit Git Sync: Smart Logical Commit
description: Identifies repository drift and performs logical, grouped commits with descriptive messages. Use it to resolve state divergence after a task.

inputs.name: dry_run
inputs.description: If true, show what would be committed without making changes.

inputs.name: task_id
inputs.description: The current task ID for context (e.g., DOC-001).

logic: Categorize changes into logical groups: Docs, AI, CLI, Core, and Misc.
The output will list the groups, the files committed, and the resulting commit messages.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: A summary report of the logical commits made.
